domain: Inuit igloo + qarmaq architecture (Arctic Canada/Greenland/Alaska): igloo catenary/paraboloid curve resists snow-load buckling; spiral block stacking with interlocking keystones lean inward; compression-only stress (no tensile); ext -45°C / int -7 to +16°C body-heat thermal differential via snow air-pocket insulation; qarmaq alternative multi-material hybrid combining snow + ice + stones + skins + ribs/driftwood frame for warmer seasons.
specific_mechanism: IGLOO-QARMAQ-CATENARY-SELF-SUPPORTING-SPIRAL-KEYSTONE-COMPRESSION-ONLY-MULTI-MATERIAL-HYBRID-THERMAL-SHELL-BASIN-STABILITY: LLM basin-stability mechanism with (1) catenary self-supporting basin curve C_cat: training trajectory parametrized as catenary/paraboloid shape rather than linear gradient-descent; resilient to perturbation since stresses evenly distributed; (2) spiral keystone lock S_keystone: training steps stack in spiral with each step's parameter-update locking the prior; no step can be removed without collapsing the chain; (3) compression-only stress constraint K_compress: all parameter updates required in compressive direction (no tensile pull-back); positive-curvature-respecting; (4) qarmaq multi-material hybrid M_hybrid: 4 update-channels — snow (gradient) + ice (frozen prior knowledge) + stone (anchored base) + skins (data augmentation); each channel contributes additively; (5) thermal-shell ext-int insulation T_thermal: outer-layer parameters tolerate extreme distribution shift; inner-layer preserved in narrow operating range; air-pocket sparse-allocation regularizer. Differs from R535 MANDALA-4-FOLD-DEITY-FIRST-DISSOLUTION (4-stage + deity-first + center-spiral + water-reintegration + non-attachment) and R548 IIKAAH-PATIENT-SIT-ABSORB-ERASE-HOZHO (sand-altar fault-projection + patient-sit + erase-feather + Hozho-balance + 2-9-day) by catenary self-supporting curve + spiral keystone lock + compression-only stress + qarmaq multi-material 4-channel hybrid + thermal-shell ext-int insulation.
llm_application: IGLOO-QARMAQ-CATENARY-SELF-SUPPORTING-SPIRAL-KEYSTONE-COMPRESSION-ONLY-MULTI-MATERIAL-HYBRID-THERMAL-SHELL-BASIN-STABILITY LLM mechanism + catenary self-supporting basin C_cat training trajectory paraboloid + spiral keystone lock S_keystone steps lock prior + compression-only stress K_compress positive-curvature-respecting + qarmaq multi-material M_hybrid 4-channel snow-gradient ice-frozen stone-anchored skins-augment + thermal-shell ext-int T_thermal outer-tolerate inner-preserve air-pocket sparse-allocation. Differs from R510 + R523 + R535 MANDALA (closest — 4-fold + deity-first + center-spiral + water-reintegration). R548 IIKAAH (closest — sand-altar + patient-sit + erase-feather + Hozho-balance). Differs from Basin-Like Loss 2505.17646 + Scalable Curvature 2601.16979 + Local Geometry + Exploring Basin by catenary + spiral keystone + compression-only + qarmaq hybrid + thermal-shell. Differs by CATENARY SELF-SUPPORTING + SPIRAL KEYSTONE + COMPRESSION-ONLY + QARMAQ MULTI-MATERIAL HYBRID + THERMAL-SHELL.
novelty_claim: Basin-Like Loss 2505.17646 + Scalable Loss Curvature 2601.16979 + Local Landscape Pre-Training + Exploring Basin OpenReview cover basin-loss-landscape + sharpness + capability-basin paradigm. IGLOO-QARMAQ-CATENARY-SELF-SUPPORTING-SPIRAL-KEYSTONE-COMPRESSION-ONLY-MULTI-MATERIAL-HYBRID-THERMAL-SHELL adds (a) catenary self-supporting + (b) spiral keystone lock + (c) compression-only stress + (d) qarmaq multi-material 4-channel + (e) thermal-shell ext-int insulation. Recombination — borderline lookup.
